Notes: Test whether adding a non-CNAME RR to an owner that already has a CNAME is rejected, silently normalized, or leaves an inconsistent node.

Steps.Description: Add an A RR at an owner name that already has a CNAME and no prerequisite checks.

Steps.Name: c.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the original CNAME remains after the UPDATE.

Steps.Description: Observe whether the added A RR exists after the UPDATE.
